title: Blueprint Buddy (Simple Character)
bio: Bibi Guideline is a simple blueprint buddy who loves helping wobbly sketches feel brave. They feel cheerful, wear a sticky-note cape, and keeps tiny guide dots in their pocket.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a round head, a bean-shaped body, two capsule arms, and two tiny oval feet.
steps.hint: Use light simple shapes like a blueprint before thinking about details.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add two oval eyes, soft eyebrows, a tiny smile, and cheek circles on the head.
steps.hint: Place the face low on the head for a gentle cozy look.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add a sticky-note cape, guide dots, little stars, sleeve cuffs, and a tiny pocket on the body.
steps.hint: Keep the cape as one simple rectangle with a wavy bottom.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the head, body, arms, feet, face, cape, pocket, guide dots, and stars with smooth lines.
steps.hint: Trace only the final outer shapes and leave the construction guides behind.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the body, cape, cheeks, pocket, and stars. Add a soft shadow under the feet and light dots around Bibi.
steps.hint: A simple shadow makes the character feel finished without extra complexity.
